recommendations.title: Still Life
recommendations.overview: A council case worker looks for the relatives of those found dead and alone.

recommendations.title: Demolition of a Wall
recommendations.overview: Auguste Lumière directs four workers in the demolition of an old wall at the Lumière factory. One worker is pressing the wall inwards with a jackscrew, while another is pushing it with a pick. When the wall hits the ground, a cloud of white dust whir

recommendations.title: Corporate

recommendations.title: Andhadhun
recommendations.overview: A series of mysterious events changes the life of a blind pianist who now must report a crime that was actually never witnessed by him.

recommendations.title: Gold Brick
recommendations.overview: Determined to even the scales and profit from his thankless job, a factory worker schemes to traffic luxury perfumes from under his employer's nose.

recommendations.title: My Piece of the Pie

recommendations.title: Strike
recommendations.overview: Workers in a factory in pre-revolutionary Russia go on strike and are met by violent suppression.

recommendations.title: Hello
recommendations.overview: Call-center workers receive a phone call from God.

recommendations.title: Moscow Does Not Believe in Tears
recommendations.overview: Living together in a workers' dorm, Katerina and her friends are determined to make it in Moscow. But when a boorish cameraman forces himself on her, Katerina finds herself pregnant and alone as her friends move on. Twenty years later, Katerina is a

recommendations.title: The Vanishing
recommendations.overview: The boyfriend of an abducted woman never gives up the search as the abductor looks on.
